# MuJoCo Menagerie Assets

This directory contains selected model assets from MuJoCo Menagerie.

## Unitree Go1

- Upstream: https://github.com/google-deepmind/mujoco_menagerie
- Upstream path: `unitree_go1`
- Imported revision: `71f066ad0be9cd271f7ed58c030243ef157af9f4`
- License: BSD-3-Clause, see `unitree_go1/LICENSE`

Keep the model-local `LICENSE` file with any redistributed copy of
`unitree_go1/scene.xml`, `unitree_go1/go1.xml`, or `unitree_go1/assets/*`.
The upstream model README states that the MJCF was derived from Unitree
Robotics' public Go1 URDF.
